word: G4325 - προσδαπανάω - prosdapanáō - pros-dap-an-ah'-o - Spend more

sections.paragraph:
- Original: προσδαπανάω

- Transliteration: Prosdapanao

- Phonetic: pros-dap-an-ah'-o

- Definition:

1. to spend besides

- Origin: from G4314 and G1159

- TDNT entry: None

- Part(s) of speech: Verb

- Strong's: From G4314 and G1159; to expend additionally: - spend more.
